title: Vaping can expose you to harmful chemicals: Poster - Canada.ca
content:
## Vaping can expose you to harmful chemicals: Poster
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 176 KB, 1 page)
Organization: Health Canada
Published: 2019-03-14
VAPING CAN EXPOSE YOU TO HARMFUL CHEMICALS
It can increase coughing, wheezing and intensify asthma symptoms in teens.
Keep your lungs healthy. Leave the vape behind.
Canada.ca/vaping-info
